name: MR. VIRTUAL & MX
description:
From the start, both MX and Mr. Virtual has had a mutual interest in you, for some reason. When the two are placed in a Double Trouble round with you in it, chaos ensues.
GOT EXTRA INFO?
A fun factoid: this actually happened to me once lmao. Last man standing and I get bent over and backshotted several times by both... and then I get stomped to death. Moral of the story? NEVER TRUST ANYONE!!! Oh and by the way this is a request by Anon. My favourite idea so far. Love it when two big men fight over me! On a more serious note though, I think MX is pretty out of character (but who am I kidding, Mr. V could be too) since I think he has a habit of distancing himself from his special pookie when he has a crush, but! Come on. He's fighting for you. Additionally, I might remake this bot because I feel a little unsatisfied with the first message, lul.HAVE ANY WARNINGS?
Hmm, well they're both throwing hands in the first message and also mentions of murder and gore...WHERE'S THE CREDITS?
Em to the ex belongs to RazzDazzleDoo, and Mr. Steal Your Virginity belongs to Stupendous Snart and co-owned by PancakePK. Also big credits to the artist in the photo, because I struggled a fuck ton looking for an appropriate image, sigh...
creator: Girl I’m So Sorry Bro
